name: Liu Bei

skills.name: Reinforced Shells
skills.description: When Basic Attacks hit a hero, it increases his Physical Pierce.

skills.name: Dual Shot
skills.description: Increases Movement Speed and enhances the next Basic Attack to damage twice.

skills.name: Leading the Charge
skills.description: Dashes forward, damaging and knocking back enemies in the way.

skills.name: Hearts and Minds
skills.description: Removes crowd control, increases Physical Attack, and gains crowd control immunity and a shield.

tips: Liu Bei (Warrior): Tier B on international ranked — 54.52% WR.
Build core: Hunting Knife, Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 54.52%, pick 0.42%, ban 0.04%, popularity tier B.
Counters Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao · Weak into Dyadia.

faqs.question: Is Liu Bei good in current season?
faqs.answer: Liu Bei is Tier B Warrior with 54.52% win rate, 0.42% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Liu Bei build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Hunting Knife, Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Vampiric Scythe. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Liu Bei?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Liu Bei: Dyadia. Liu Bei is strong into Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lady Zhen, Nuwa, Xiao Qiao. Countered by: Dyadia.
